zh.Heukelum, Vuren, Gelderland, Netherlands: 荷蘭蓋爾德藍德倫可盧姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Otto I van Arkel於大約1237年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德阿可爾時，他的父親Herbaren II van Arkel34歲，母親Aleidis van Heusden48歲。他和Mechteld van Heusden至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德令瓦阿爾可盧姆被列為heer。他去世於大約1283年在他的家鄉享年48歲。

zh-hans.Heukelum, Vuren, Gelderland, Netherlands: 荷兰蓋爾德藍德倫可盧姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Otto I van Arkel于大约1237年出生在荷兰-拉藍德阿可爾时，他的父亲Herbaren II van Arkel34岁，母亲Aleidis van Heusden48岁。他和Mechteld van Heusden至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。他在荷兰蓋爾德藍德令瓦阿爾可盧姆被列为heer。他去世于大约1283年在他的家乡享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Arkel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Breton: from the Old Breton personal name Arthmael, composed of the elements arth ‘bear’ (in a transferred sense ‘soldier’) + mael ‘prince’, Latinized as Armagilus. This was the name of a Christian saint (5th century) who was the subject of a local cult in Brittany.
Jewish (from Ukraine): artificial name from Yiddish dialect (h)arml ‘hermine’.

variants.name: Ermel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Heinz, Jurgen, Markus, Matthias.

German: from Middle High German ermel ‘sleeve’, a metonymic occupational name for a sleeve maker. Alternatively, it may have been a nickname for someone who wore clothing with conspicuous sleeves; in medieval times the size of sleeves was regulated by luxury laws.
German: from a pet form of any of the ancient Germanic personal names formed with Erm, from erm, irm ‘all-encompassing, great’. This surname is also found in France (Alsace). Compare Armel 1.

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

en.lifeSummary: When Otto I van Arkel was born about 1237, in Arkel, South Holland, Netherlands, his father, Herbaren II van Arkel, was 34 and his mother, Aleidis van Heusden, was 48. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Mechteld van Heusden. His occupation is listed as heer in Heukelum, Lingewaal, Gelderland, Netherlands. He died about 1283, in his hometown, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Otto I van Arkel est né environ 1237, à Arkel, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Herbaren II van Arkel, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Aleidis van Heusden, avait 48 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Mechteld van Heusden. Sa profession de son indiquée est heer à Heukelum, Lingewaal, Gueldre, Pays-Bas. Il est décédé environ 1283, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Otto I van Arkel um 1237 in Arkel, Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Herbaren II van Arkel 34 und seine Mutter Aleidis van Heusden 48. Er hatte mit Mechteld van Heusden mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als heer in Heukelum, Lingewaal, Geldern, Niederlande aufgeführt. Er starb um 1283 im Alter von 48 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Otto I van Arkel è nato il circa 1237 nel Arkel, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Herbaren II van Arkel, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Aleidis van Heusden, aveva 48 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Mechteld van Heusden. La sua occupazione è indicata come heer nel Heukelum, Lingewaal, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi. Morì circa 1283, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.South Holland, Netherlands: オランダズイド-hオランド

ja.Heukelum, Vuren, Gelderland, Netherlands: オランダジェルダーランドvウレンヘウケルム
ja.lifeSummary: Otto I van Arkelが約1237年にオランダズイド-hオランドアルケルで生まれた時，父Herbaren II van Arkelは34歳，母Aleidis van Heusdenは48歳であった。彼はMechteld van Heusdenとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。オランダジェルダーランドリンジェワアルヘウケルムでの職業はheerと記録されている。彼は約1283年に故郷で48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Otto I van Arkel(이)가 대략 1237년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 아클에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Herbaren II van Arkel(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Aleidis van Heusden(은)는 48세였다. 그는 Mechteld van Heusden(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 네덜란드 글델랜드 링와앨 헤우켈럼에서 heer이었다. 그는 대략 1283년 그의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Abt 1237–Abt 1283: tany ho any amin'ny 1237–tany ho any amin'ny 1283

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Otto I van Arkel nasceu aproximadamente 1237, em Arkel, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Herbaren II van Arkel, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Aleidis van Heusden, tinha 48 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Mechteld van Heusden. Sua profissão aparece como heer em Heukelum, Lingewaal, Gheldria, Países Baixos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1283, em sua cidade natal, com 48 anos.

ro.Heukelum, Vuren, Gelderland, Netherlands: Heukelum, Vuren, Gelderland, Ţările de Jos

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Otto I van Arkel родился около 1237 г. в местности аркел, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Herbaren II van Arkel было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Aleidis van Heusden, 48. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Mechteld van Heusden.  Он работал по профессии heer в местности хеукелум, лингюааль, джелдирланд, Нидерланды. Он умер около 1283 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 48 лет.

sm.Abt 1237–Abt 1283: e tusa o le 1237–e tusa o le 1283

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Otto I van Arkel nació aproximadamente 1237, en Arkel, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Herbaren II van Arkel, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Aleidis van Heusden, tenía 48 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Mechteld van Heusden. Su ocupación registrada era heer en Heukelum, Lingewaal, Gelderland, Países Bajos. Murió aproximadamente 1283, en su pueblo, a la edad de 48 años.
